steps.t: The Nink-hai Orc-tribe can be found south-west of Odda's tent. Odda has asked you to search among the Nink-hai tents for evidence leading to the locat…
The Uruk-hai, Dargum, may be found along the Limlight River to the south-east. You have discovered a note which reveals the name and location of the U…
The Uruk-hai may be bound with the rope on the ground near his tent. With Dargum defeated, he must be bound and escorted in custody to Stangard.
